# Starry Stepping Stones
## Scripture
"The path of the righteous is like the morning sun, shining ever brighter till the full light of day." - Proverbs 4:18

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the gentle guidance God provides for our lives. Just as the stars have been used for centuries as navigational aids, God's presence illuminates our path, helping us navigate life's journey. The scripture reminds us that the path of the righteous is like the morning sun, shining ever brighter till the full light of day. This imagery encourages us to trust in God's sovereignty, knowing that He is constantly guiding us toward a brighter future.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we look up at the starry night sky, we're reminded of Your gentle guidance in our lives. Help us to trust in Your sovereignty, knowing that You are constantly guiding us toward a brighter future. May the light of Your presence shine brightly in our hearts, illuminating our path and giving us the courage to take each step with confidence. As we journey through life, may we be reminded that You are our constant companion, our North Star, guiding us home to You. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
